title: Bhed Ek Rahesya
desc: A web of intrigue unfolds when a professional killer, Sattu, is tasked with kidnapping industrialist Sudhakar Rana's family. Meanwhile unaware of the danger, Sudhakar's daughter, Ishika becomes entangled with a manipulative drug peddler, Lucky. As secrets and hidden motives emerge, the film takes audiences on a thrilling journey of suspense and unexpected revelations.

title: Maqbool
desc: In Mumbai's criminal underworld, the lord of all lords is Jahangir Khan (Pankaj Kapoor). Those loyal to him include Maqbool (Irfan Khan), his chief. But Maqbool is in love with Nimmi (Tabu), Jahangir's mistress, who convinces him to be ambitious and take over the empire. After maneuvering potential rivals out of the way, Maqbool betrays Jahangir, murdering him in his own bed. However, it isn't long before both Maqbool and Nimmi are haunted by the ghosts of their treacherous deeds.

title: Bhoothnath
desc: Banku and his parents move into their new home, the Nath Villa. Here, Banku meets the unfriendly ghost of the former owner. Not only does Banku befriend him but also helps him make his final journey.

title: Gandhi My Father
desc: The turbulent and troubled life of Gandhi's son, Harilal, who at once tried to support his father's ideology, while simultaneously trying to create a life for himself, separate from his family name.

title: Diary Of A Butterfly
desc: Gul, an aspiring model, wants to make it big in the fashion industry and decides to leave no stone unless turned to achieve success. However, she soon realises that success comes at a price
